Ntc Of Mtn And Pltf'S Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL P. IANNITELLI OF THE MCGARY FIRM, TEL. NO. 874-3500 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ROBERT N. CAMPBELL OF THE CAMPBELL & CLARK LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (530) 244-6286 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF BEVERLY LIMNELL'S MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED ON THE TERMS OF THE 9/11/09 SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, REGARDING APPROVAL BY THE PARTIES OF THE TRUST IN ITS MOST RECENT FORM (THE 3/23/10 VERSION WITH AMENDMENT NO. ONE), BECOMING IRREVOCABLE UPON APPROVAL, WITH THE EXISTING TERMS, INCLUDING THE INVASION OF PRINCIPAL AND DISTRIBUTION TERMS, BUT NAMING ONLY MR. RUSSO AS TRUSTEE, AND REQUIRING THE PARTIES TO TRANSFER THEIR JOINT TENANCY ONE-HALF OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY TO THE TRUST. PREPARATION OF ANY SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST WILL BE THE RESPONSIBILITY OF DEFENDANT OR HIS BROTHER, AND IS NOT PART OF THE JUDGMENT. THE COURT WILL ALSO INCLUDE LANGUAGE THAT THE LIMITATION THAT ANY REQUEST BY THE PLAINTIFF AS WELL AS ANY AMOUNT THAT CO-TRUSTEE MAY DETERMINE IS FOR THE PLAINTIFF'S HEALTH, EDUCATION, MAINTENANCE AND SUPPORT IN ACCORDANCE WITH HER CUSTOM AND STANDARD OF LIVING. (AMENDMENT NUMBER ONE, ARTICLE 3). DAUGHTER'S INTEREST IS ALSO COVERED. MR. IANNITELLI TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
